svg.text: Three integration patterns — no changes required on either side
after — change base URL to proxy endpoint
Pattern 2 — SDK decorator (5 lines of code)
no before-state, no proof, no receipt
Pattern 3 — sidecar (enterprise, zero code, infrastructure level)
platform-agnostic design — the four choices that make it work everywhere
works with every agent framework and every AI provider
OpenAI function calling · Anthropic tool_use · Gemini functionCall · MCP JSON-RPC
LangChain · CrewAI · AutoGen · OpenAI Agents SDK · Strands · Claude Code
any REST API · any database driver · any filesystem tool · any external service
